why: New behavioral node sdd/touch-set-correction (21 boolean scenarios) for the git-diff touch-set correction tool — post-hoc reconcile of a declared touch-set vs the real diff (git diff + resolve-governances + gherkin-cli diff), read-only w.r.t. the mission graph. Cold sdd-spec-judge ALIGNED true (oracle/builder/architect all PASS) on round 2 after a judge-iteration correction closed two builder coverage gaps (unresolvable artifact-type; frozen-vs-unfrozen touched .feature) and removed a premature @frozen; check-spec-state + check-suite green. Scope held strictly to the correction tool — finer-than-node ladder, hard/soft classification, SSA-lowering deferred to #189 remainder. Low-medium blast (new node, single-writer by construction, no existing consumers), leash auto-all.

Cold sdd-impl-judge re-derived all 21 frozen touch-set-correction scenarios as independent oracles: all PASS on round 2. Round 1 rejected (IMPLEMENTATION_PASS false) — mutation testing caught artifactType computed-but-not-surfaced (NodeDetail.files was bare string[]); fixed in code (NodeFile[] {path,artifactType}), tests strengthened, corrected via the recorded judge-iteration correction. Round 2: 23/23 node:tests, independent scratchpad repro over own fixtures (quill/render-doc layout) 7/7, all 3 mutation probes caught (artifactType garble now fails 3 tests, missed/overDeclared swap, corrected=declared), CLI sanity TOON+JSON shows per-file artifactType live end-to-end, structural read clean (read-only w.r.t. graph, no hard/soft/ladder/region/SSA, honest pure/IO split, composes not reimplements), ownership clean (.feature untouched post-freeze). Root pnpm verify green (20/20). Low-medium blast internal SDD engine, leash auto-all.
